title: Youtube Music Clone
description: Request to create a clone of Youtube Music.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Youtube Music Clone (DEM-2026-0014)

Executive Summary
This project proposes creating a Youtube Music clone to expand our customer digital offerings. The goal is to capture market share in the rapidly growing online music streaming sector.

Direct Business Value/Impact
It will generate new revenue through subscriptions and advertising, driving customer acquisition. This initiative enhances our brand's presence and competitiveness in digital entertainment.

Potential Risk Mitigation
High risks involve intellectual property and market competition. Mitigation includes thorough legal vetting, phased development, and a differentiated content strategy to ensure uniqueness.
capacity_reasoning: High-risk demand requires Senior Architect oversight.
Delivery team has 26% overall available capacity.
Constraint: Frontend Developer has only 15 units available (requires 20).
Constraint: Senior Architect has only 5 units available (requires 15).
Skill gap: Required skills Backend Development, Frontend Development, Database, API Development, Audio Streaming, System Architecture, DevOps are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-08.
